author: lepryko
orig: to moze warto kupic z 20 i akcesoria opierdolic xD ?
en: so maybe it's worth buying 20 and the accessories to fuck off xD?
pt: então talvez valha a pena comprar 20 e os acessórios para se foder xD?
label: xenophobic

context.author: d3_stro
context.orig: a runy macie jakos specjalnie ulepszane czy po kolei?
context.en: Do you upgrade your runes in a special way or one at a time?
context.pt: Você atualiza suas runas de uma maneira especial ou uma de cada vez?

context.author: kitsunszan21
context.en: I have a knight 17 priest 24 ranger 24
context.pt: Eu tenho um cavaleiro 17 sacerdote 24 ranger 24

context.author: lepryko
context.orig: ej w sumie z act bossow leca akcesoria, i jak one chodza po 4-8zl, a kamienie na bossa po 70gr
context.en: hey, actually, accessories are flying from act bosses, and they cost PLN 4-8, and boss stones cost PLN 70
context.pt: ei, na verdade, os acessórios estão voando dos chefes de ação e custam PLN 4-8, e as pedras dos chefes custam PLN 70

context.orig: To ranger + priest tak czy ranger+ knight ?
context.en: Is it ranger + priest or ranger + knight?

context.author: xbiedro
context.orig: no ja sobie otwierałem wczoraj rano 42 soulstone'y na 3-10 i dostałem z 4-5 akcesoriów i to zielonych
context.en: Well, yesterday morning I opened 42 soulstones for 3-10 and I got 4-5 accessories, and they were green.
context.pt: Bem, ontem de manhã abri 42 soulstones por 3-10 e consegui 4-5 acessórios, e eles eram verdes.
